puzzle.hint: This verse encourages a specific manner of supplication and warns against exceeding limits in prayer.
puzzle.arabic: ٱدْعُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ تَضَرُّعًۭا وَخُفْيَةً ۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُعْتَدِينَ
puzzle.verseEn: Call upon your Lord in humility and privately; indeed, He does not like transgressors.
